headline: Review & Preview: Powell’s Regret
summary: It turns out investors care about more than just oil prices.  Stocks opened lower this morning after the latest measure of inflation, the producer price index, showed an uptick in pricing pressures.  Then the real news hit: the Fed kept its rate cuts on pause and chair Jerome Powell expressed some disappointment about the state of inflation.

headline: FedEx earnings, mortgage rates, jobless claims: What to Watch
summary: Market Domination Overtime Host Josh Lipton previews several of the biggest stories to come tomorrow, Thursday, March 19, including earnings results from Alibaba (BABA, 9988.HK) and FedEx (FDX); US mortgage rates and new home sales; and the latest reading on initial jobless claims data.

headline: USPS must win higher-value, heavier packages, CEO says
summary: The Postal Service wants to increase its average package weight to improve its competitive position with FedEx and UPS, Postmaster General David Steiner said.

headline: Fed Meeting, PPI, Micron Earnings: Happening This Week
